description: Sami Kassab discusses decentralized physical infrastructure networks (Deepin) and their potential to incentivize real-world infrastructure deployment using token economics. He explains the categories of Deepin, including server networks, decentralized wireless networks, sensor networks, and energy networks, highlighting their innovative applications and challenges.
topic_summary: Explore the concept of decentralized physical infrastructure networks (Deepin) with Sami Kassab, focusing on how blockchain technology can incentivize the development of real-world infrastructure like wireless networks and sensor systems. [t=0:24] to [t=299:46]
